steps.title: Substitute the given temperature and remove the constant
steps.content:
Substitute $h = 467.33$ into the formula and subtract 32 from both sides to isolate the fraction:
$$467.33 = \frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}+32$$
$$435.33 = \frac{9(v-273.15)}{5}$$

steps.title: Clear the denominator and coefficient
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 5 to clear the denominator, then divide by 9 to isolate $(v - 273.15)$:
$$2176.65 = 9(v-273.15)$$
$$241.85 = v - 273.15$$

steps.title: Add the offset constant
steps.content:
Add 273.15 to both sides to find $v$:
$$v = 241.85 + 273.15 = 515$$
The corresponding temperature is 515 kelvins.
